Name: MindfulKids HK
Tagline: MindfulKids, a path to IMMA recognized Mindfulness Teacher, specially designed for parents, social workers, teachers, and other child workers.
About: MindfulKids® consists of a highly experienced team of talented psychological professionals to provide quality services to individuals and organizations. Eva Wong is now based in Malaysia, and is the contact point for MindfulKids®️ Malaysia * Ms.
Philosophy: MindfulKids HK employs a holistic approach to mindfulness, integrating evidence-based practices to foster emotional resilience and cognitive flexibility in children. The program is tailored to the unique cultural and educational landscape of Hong Kong, promoting well-rounded development.
Outcomes: Participants of MindfulKids HK have reported improved focus and emotional regulation, contributing positively to their academic performance and personal growth. The program has been recognized for enhancing students' readiness for the challenges of the IB and DSE curricula.
Admissions: To join MindfulKids HK, interested parties can apply online through their website, with intakes typically occurring at the start of each academic term. Applicants may be required to attend an introductory session to assess suitability and alignment with program goals.
Quote: Nurturing young minds with mindfulness, empowering children to thrive with resilience and compassion.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: MindfulKids HK staff hold advanced degrees in psychology and mindfulness, with international certifications from renowned institutions. Their team includes professionals with extensive experience in child development and educational psychology.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: MindfulKids HK provides comprehensive pastoral care, including personalized counselling and group workshops, to enhance students' emotional resilience. They foster a supportive community, promoting mental health awareness within Hong Kong's educational landscape.
Performance.Academic Integration: MindfulKids HK integrates mindfulness techniques with the IB and DSE curricula, enhancing students' focus and stress management. Their approach supports cognitive flexibility, crucial for success in Hong Kong's rigorous academic environment.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of MindfulKids HK have achieved notable success, with high acceptance rates into top universities and improved DSE scores. Their program equips students with skills essential for academic and personal achievements.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: MindfulKids HK boasts state-of-the-art facilities, including meditation studios and sensory rooms, designed to support mindfulness practices. These spaces provide a serene environment conducive to learning and personal growth.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: MindfulKids HK maintains quality through regular progress reports and feedback sessions with parents. Their programs are subject to periodic reviews, ensuring alignment with educational standards and student needs in Hong Kong.
